projects.title: Communal Typewriter Journal
projects.description: A cinematic digital journaling web app inspired by vintage typewriters, analog poetry, and dark academia interfaces. Features live sound design, ink ribbon switching, and snapshot exports.

projects.title: Real-Time ASCII Engine
projects.description: A live image-processing engine that transforms webcam frames into dynamic ASCII art through luminance mapping and character rendering.

projects.title: Trip Co
projects.description: An AI-powered itinerary generation app that crafts personalized travel plans based on user preferences, budget, and duration. Currently under active development.

projects.description: An atmospheric visual narrative with a focus on rhythm, vintage aesthetics, and meticulous color grading.

projects.title: for myself
projects.description: A creative personal birthday video edit.

projects.title: Year 2025
projects.description: A nostalgic video compilation of memories from the year 2025.

projects.title: @life_at_upes Collab
projects.description: My first-year collaboration video with the official UPES Instagram page (@life_at_upes), which helped me connect with many talented people at my college.

projects.title: Saharsh Style Edit
projects.description: A cinematic video edit set to audio by Saharsh (a well-known cinematographer), who appreciated, shared, and commented on the work on his socials.

projects.title: Chakrata Day Trip
projects.description: Creative vlog of the trip - CHAKRATA DAY TRIP 'with da boys'

projects.title: Javed Ali Reveal
projects.description: The voice that melts hearts..... The legend himself, Javed Ali is coming to set the stage on fire at UURJA’25! Realme Music Studio brings the magic, powered by Realme P3 Ultra 5G.

projects.title: DJ Aerro Reveal
projects.description: The bass is about to hit, and the energy is about to explode! DJ Aerro is here to set UURJA on fire—get ready for a night of unstoppable madness!

projects.title: Mame Khan Reveal
projects.description: Do you get lost in Coke Studio sessions, dreaming of witnessing your favorite artist live? Well, UURJA brings Mame Khan! Get ready to be mesmerized by Rajasthan’s folk music.

projects.title: Behind the Scenes Workflow
projects.description: Behind every cinematic edit is hours of grading, cutting, and syncing. A glimpse of the editing workflow behind the @life_at_upes collaboration reels.

about.title: Engineering meets cinematography
paragraphs: I'm Aditya Parihar, a BTech CSE student specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning at UPES. I'm passionate about backend architecture, computational logic, and software development.
Alongside engineering, I've worked as Lead Video Editor @life_at_upes and as a freelance editor — blending deep technical knowledge in Java and Computer Vision with professional video production.

testimonial.title: What drives the work
testimonial.quote: I build software the way I edit film — with intention, rhythm, and an obsession for the details that make a system feel alive.
testimonial.author: Aditya Parihar

cta.title: Have a project in mind?
cta.description: Open to collaborations, open-source contributions, and engineering opportunities.

brands.name: Zenrun Club
brands.description: An online membership platform and community focused on mindful, stress-free running, helping runners find balance and enjoyment without performance pressure.

brands.name: Eatiyapa
brands.description: A popular local food and hospitality brand based in Dehradun, known for its distinct culinary identity and vibrant takeaway offerings.

brands.name: Paradox
brands.description: Tanishq Singh (Paradox), a versatile Indian hip-hop artist and MTV Hustle 2.0 runner-up, celebrated for blending melodic rap with regional influences.

brands.name: Mall of Dehradun
brands.description: A premier shopping and entertainment destination in Uttarakhand, offering a mix of international retail brands, dining options, and multiplex experiences.

brands.name: Qua Restaurant
brands.description: A highly-rated fine-dining restaurant and bar on Rajpur Road, Dehradun, renowned for its elegant ambiance, live music, and diverse cuisine.

brands.name: UPES
brands.description: The University of Petroleum and Energy Studies, a prestigious private university in Dehradun recognized for its specialized, industry-aligned academic programs.
